name: Certified SOLIDWORKS Associate
description: Industry recognized certification in SolidWorks for part modeling, assembly design, and technical drawing. Validates proficiency in 3D CAD tools used across aerospace, automotive, and manufacturing sectors.

name: AI Fluency for Students
description: Foundational program covering AI tools, responsible use, and practical applications in academic and professional contexts.

name: Microsoft Azure Essentials Professional Certificate
description: Cloud computing fundamentals covering Azure infrastructure, services, and deployment. Covers core concepts relevant to data center operations and scalable compute architectures.
